CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points STRUC_DESC "Sheet Pile Closure" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "On-Screen Digitized Using 2010 DOQQ" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "Shapefiles From Kristi Cantu" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "Grand Liard Marsh and Ridge Restoration" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "Extracted from USACE shapefiles" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "Extracted from USACE shapefiles" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "Storm-Proofing of Interior Pumping Stations" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "North Lake Mechant Landbridge Restoration" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points COMMENTS ""Marked inactive/hide 2/7/2014 per Syd's request"" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points STRUC_DESC "2 m x 2 m vegetation plot" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "Coordinates provided (05/29/2014) in spreadsheet from Danielle Richardi" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "Coastwide Vegetative Planting" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "On-Screen Digitized Using 2010 DOQQ" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points COMMENTS "None to Report" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "None to Report" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "On-Screen Digitized Using MAP" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "Hydrologic Restoration and Vegetative Planting in the Lac des Allemands Swamp" VB #
CalculateField "New Group Layer\CPRA_Inf_Points" QAQC_BY "Rocky Wager" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "South Grand Chenier Marsh Creation" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "As-builts from Brian Babin" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "Calcasieu River Salinity Control Measures" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points PROJ_NAME "West Pointe a la Hache Outfall Management (Deauthorized)" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points COMMENTS "CWPPRA Task Force completed the deauthorization process for BA-04c at the January 22, 2015 CWPPRA Task Force Meeting" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points COMMENTS "CWPPRA Task Force completed the deauthorization process for BA-04c at the January 22, 2015 CWPPRA Task Force Meeting" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "Extracted from USACE shapefiles" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DATA_SOURCE "Extracted from USACE shapefiles" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "Features extracted from HNTB LeveeGeodatabase" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points DIG_COMMENT "Features extracted from HNTB LeveeGeodatabase" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points STRUC_DESC "Pipeline canal plug designed to an elevation of +6' and crown width of 10'" VB #
CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points STRUC_DESC "Bayou Tigre pump station with 530 cfs" VB #
CalculateField "CPRA Projects GDB\CPRA_Inf_Points" COMMENTS "Structure description pulled from USACE DP FD Website" VB #

CalculateField "CPRA Projects GDB\CPRA_Inf_Points" STRUC_DESC "Stone weir, total length is 458', bottom width of boat bay is 30', boat bay bottom elev is - 5' NAVD 88, wier crest is +1' NAVD 88, 4 piling clusters with Nav. aid lights and warning signs," VB #

CalculateField "CPRA Projects GDB\CPRA_Inf_Points" STRUC_DESC "Stone weir, total length is 458', bottom width of boat bay is 30', boat bay bottom elev is - 5' NAVD 88, wier crest is +1' NAVD 88, 4 piling clusters with Nav. aid lights and warning signs, 6 single pilings w/warning signs, 32 buoys" VB #

CalculateField CPRA_Inf_Points STRUC_DESC ""Variable crest weir structure w/12' wide boat bay. (6) bays 5 ft. wide w/timber stop logs to control water levels, total capacity is 500 cfs"" VB #

mdContact.rpOrgName: Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

distorCont.rpOrgName: Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

distorOrdPrc.resFees: No costs associated with this data

citRespParty.rpOrgName: These data were created through a cooperative agreement between the Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA) and the U.S. Geological Survey, National Wetlands Research Center

dataIdInfo.idAbs: Contains point features for infrastructure associated with CPRA coastal protection and coastal restoration projects. These features include but are not limited to culverts, floodgates, weirs, plugs, and pump stations.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: The intended purpose of this data set is to provide point features for infrastructure associated with CPRA coastal protection and coastal restoration projects.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: These data were created through a cooperative agreement between the Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA) and the U.S. Geological Survey, National Wetlands Research Center

idPoC.rpOrgName: Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

LegConsts.useLimit: See access and use constraints information.
LegConsts.othConsts: Other Constraints: It is strongly recommended that this data is directly acquired from the distributor described above and or from another Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA) server and not indirectly through other sources which may have changed the data in some way. The distributor makes no claims as to the data's suitability for other purposes.

Restriction Code: other restrictions; Other Constraints: It is strongly recommended that this data is directly acquired from the distributor described above and or from another Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA) server and not indirectly through other sources which may have changed the data in some way. The distributor makes no claims as to the data's suitability for other purposes.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attr.attrdef: Completed construction date of the project feature. Date 1/1/1900 represents year unknown.
attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attr.attrdef: Project Sponsor based on funding source.
attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attrdomv.udom: USFWS/USACE-The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service/The United States Army Corps of Engineers, CPRA-The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana, CPRA/NRDA-The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana/Natural Resource Damage Assessment, CPRA/USACE-The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana/The United States Army Corps of Engineers, EPA-The United States Environmental Protection Agency, EPA/NRCS-The United States Environmental Protection Agency/The Natural Resources Conservation Service, EPA/USACE-The United States Environmental Protection Agency/The United States Army Corps of Engineers, GIILD-Grand Isle Independent Levee District, HUD-The United States Department of Housing and Urban Development, LADOTD-The Lousiana Department of Trasportation and Development, MMS-The Mineral Management Service, NMFS-The National Marine Fisheries Service, NOAA-The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, NRCS-The Natural Resources Conservation Service, NRCS/USACE-The Natural Resources Conservation Service/The United States Army Corps of Engineers, NRCS/USFWS-The Natural Resources Conservation Service/The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, PARISH-Louisiana Parish projects, USACE-The United States Army Corps of Engineers, USFWS-The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, FEMA-The Federal Emergency Management Agency, LOSCO-Louisiana Oil Spill Coordinators Office, BOEM-Bureau of Ocean Energy Management

attr.attrdef: CPRA identification number for project (Basin Abbreviation  Sequential Number with Leading Zeros).
attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attrdomv.udom: CPRA identification number for project (Basin Abbreviation - Sequential Number with Leading Zeros)</) Ex. TE-0001, CS-0001, etc.

attr.attrdef: Program under which the project feature is being planned, designed, and constructed.
attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attrdomv.udom: ARRA-The American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009, BERM-Berm to Barrier projects, CDBG-The Community Development Block Grant CIAP-The Coastal Impact Assistance Program, CIAP PARISH-The Coastal Impact Assistance Program parish projects, CWPPRA -The Coastal Wetlands Planning, Protection, and Restoration Act, FEMA-The Federal Emergency Agency, HSDRRS-Hurricane and Storm Damage Risk Reduction System, LCA-The Louisiana Coastal Area Program, LOSCO-The Louisiana Oil Spill Coordinator’s Office, Monitoring Reference-Control boundary locations for select CWPPRA projects, NFWF-The National Fish and Wildlife Foundation, NOAA-The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, NRDA-The Natural Resource Damage Assessment, STATE-The State of Louisiana Wetland Conservation and Restoration Program Act, WRDA-The Water Resources Development Act, WRDA204_1135-The Water Resources Development Act 204_1135, OIL SPILL-Projects funded with Oil Spill Revenues, FEDERAL-Projects funded with Federal Revenues, CHRISTMAS TREE-The Louisiana Christmas Tree Program, VEGETATION PLANTING-The Louisiana Multi-Year Vegetation Planting Program, RESTORE-The Resources and Ecosystems Sustainability, Tourist Opportunities, and Revived Economies of the Gulf Coast States Act, GOMESA-Gulf of Mexico Energy Security Act

attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attr.attrdef: Project Feature Identification. 'N/A' represents structure id not applicable or not available.
attr.attrdefs: The Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority of Louisiana (CPRA)

attr.attrdef: Project priority list as authorized each year by the Coastal Wetland Planning, Protection and Restoration Act (CWPPRA). PPL '9999' and 'N/A' represent non CWPPRA projects.
